comments_made.124: 2026-04-19 root cause analysis of workflow failures

notes: PR #141 is duplicate of #140 - awaiting close by maintainer. Dependabot PRs #129, #130, #131 still open. Task 9 (this run): added NIST SHA256 test vectors (56-byte padding boundary, 112-byte two-block, 1M-a incremental). Task 3 (this run): fixed INT_MIN UB in l_vsnprintf %*d width negation. coverage_manifest.json is outdated (2026-04-01) - doesn't include l_getrandom, l_tt_* functions.
